subject.title: Anthropic: fix multi-turn not functioning with new `web_fetch` and `web_search` tools
subject.body:
Follow up to [#12688](https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/12668). Specifically, see https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/12668#issuecomment-3993668689

In a multi-turn situation, sending another message after a `web_fetch_20260209` or `web_search_20260209` invocation is currently failing with an error as follows, that appears to come directly from the Anthropic API:

```
messages.1: `code_execution` tool use with id `srvtoolu_01HopAaXMHo9To3RavUYwqy7` was found without a corresponding `code_execution_tool_result` block
```

Since the `code_execution` tool call is injected by Anthropic and therefore considered dynamic and simply calls another tool, it's unclear what kind of tool result is expected here (the `code_execution` tool is not and per the API does not need to be explicitly provided).

cc @aayush-kapoor
